testimonials.name: Rezaul Karim
testimonials.text: Rover Consultancy made my Thailand visa process incredibly smooth. Their team guided me through every document requirement and I got my visa in just 5 days. Highly professional service!

testimonials.name: Farzana Akter
testimonials.text: I was nervous about the UK visa process but the Rover team handled everything with such care and expertise. They even helped organize my bank statements and documentation checklist.

testimonials.name: Mohammad Hasan
testimonials.text: Excellent consultancy service. They explained every step of my Australian visa application clearly and were always available on WhatsApp whenever I had questions. Truly trusted partners.

testimonials.name: Nasrin Sultana
testimonials.text: Alhamdulillah, our Umrah journey was made so easy by Rover Consultancy. From visa processing to guidance on documents, everything was handled professionally and respectfully.

testimonials.name: Imran Chowdhury
testimonials.text: As someone who travels frequently for business, I appreciate Rover's speed and reliability. My Singapore e-visa was processed within 3 days with zero complications.

testimonials.name: Sabrina Islam
testimonials.text: Planning our honeymoon to the Maldives was effortless with Rover's help. Quick visa processing and genuinely caring customer service. We highly recommend them to every couple.
